goal: Fix UUID generation, exception logging, optimistic locking, payout references, FK constraints, unique constraints, and rollbacks

tasks.name: Fix common module (W5, W6, W7)
tasks.action: Replace custom UUID v7 with java-uuid-generator library. Add log.error to generic exception handler. Add @Version to BaseEntity.

tasks.name: Fix payout reference number + version column migration (W11, W7)
tasks.action: Fix generateReferenceNumber() to use UUID v7 substring. Create Liquibase changeset for version column on all tables.

tasks.name: Liquibase FK constraints, unique constraints, rollbacks (B8, W18, W19)
tasks.action: Create changeset with ON DELETE RESTRICT FKs for all relationships. Add UNIQUE on reference_number columns. Include rollback definitions.

commitMessage: fix(common,payout,app): data integrity fixes and cross-cutting improvements
